payload.blocked_reason: AC 4 is unsatisfiable with the current schema: every event in .specfuse/features/FEAT-2026-0008-driver-completeness-guard/events.jsonl uses source='driver' which does not match the schema's source pattern ^(human|specs|pm|qa|config-steward|merge-watcher|component:[a-z0-9][a-z0-9-]*)$. The task_started per-type schema (additionalProperties: false, requires issue_url + branch) also rejects those events' payloads. validate-event.py correctly applies the schema and exits 1 for every fixture line. Fix requires either: (a) adding 'driver' to the schema's source enum and updating the task_started per-type schema to allow the driver's actual payload shape, or (b) amending the AC to allow asserting exit != 0 (documenting that already-emitted events are invalid per schema). Note: jsonschema must also be added to pyproject.toml dev deps (currently missing) for this test to pass in CI environments without a system-level jsonschema installation.
